classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标裁剪区域显示减速机构外形与剖视尺寸，包含'L8'、'L4'、'L6'、'ΦD8 H7'、'ΦD4 h7'、'ΦC3'等长度、直径、公差和安装尺寸标注；完整源图标题为'尺寸图 Dimensional Drawing'且单位为mm，因此属于机械结构尺寸图。

text_annotations.correction_note: OCR split vertical diameter callout; corrected H/80 fragments to ΦD8 h7 based on visible callout.
Added punctuation spacing for normalized readable callout.
Corrected OCR suffix hz to h7.
Corrected OCR reading 2 to visible vertical callout C9.
Corrected OCR reading 90 to visible vertical callout D6.

terminology_notes: h7 indicates ISO shaft tolerance class.
translation_notes: Variable dimension labels such as L8, D4, C9 are preserved as drawing parameters rather than numeric values.

dimension_records.reason: Top horizontal dimension spanning main assembly length.
Horizontal axial dimension at shaft/flange interface.
Horizontal axial dimension near shaft datum shoulder.
Horizontal short axial dimension at left interface.
Horizontal axial dimension between adjacent vertical extension lines.
Callout includes a length variable and 45 degree chamfer angle.
Vertical diameter callout with h7 tolerance; OCR required fragment merge and correction.
Vertical note explicitly indicates L9 depth.
Left-side vertical diameter dimension with h7 tolerance.
Left-side vertical diameter dimension with h7 tolerance.
Left-side vertical diameter callout.
Outer vertical diameter dimension at left.
Inner vertical diameter dimension near central shaft feature.
Left-side vertical diameter callout.
Vertical shaft diameter callout with h7 tolerance; OCR suffix corrected.
Small horizontal length dimension inside left section.
Right-side vertical envelope dimension; OCR correction needed.
Vertical local dimension near lower left shaft interface; OCR correction needed.

engineering_summary.mounting_interface: Visible mounting/interface parameters include C9 and partial lower-interface dimensions, but several C-series callouts lack usable OCR source_ids in the provided list.
engineering_summary.shaft_and_key_interface: Shaft/interface callouts include ΦD1 h7, ΦD3 h7, ΦD4 h7, ΦD8 h7, ΦD12, ΦD2, ΦD5, ΦD7, L1, L3, L4, L5, L6, L8, L9 depth, L10×45°, and D6.
engineering_summary.overall_envelope_and_clearance: Overall axial envelope is represented by L8; visible height envelope includes C9.
engineering_summary.connector_considerations: Connector/right-side geometry is visible, but no reliable connector text source_ids are available in the provided OCR list.
engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: Numeric values for symbolic dimensions are not specified in the drawing crop; several visible C-series labels are not extracted with reliable source_ids.

unresolved_items.issue: Low-confidence isolated I-like fragment near dimension line; treated as structural/arrow noise, not a text annotation.
Very low-confidence isolated digit fragment near dimension line; treated as noise.
Low-confidence isolated I-like fragment near dimension line; treated as structural/arrow noise.
Low-confidence isolated digit fragment; no reliable engineering callout.
Low-confidence isolated digit fragment; no reliable engineering callout.
Low-confidence isolated I-like fragment on right-side geometry; likely line/noise.
Low-confidence isolated L fragment; no complete callout.
Low-confidence isolated L fragment; no complete callout.
Low-confidence isolated digit fragment; no reliable engineering callout.
Large overlapping OCR box reading 0 over multiple valid diameter labels; duplicate/noise removed.
Large overlapping OCR box reading 881 over drawing area; aggregate false positive removed.
Low-confidence isolated L fragment on body area; likely line/noise.
Low-confidence isolated J fragment on connector area; likely line/noise.
Very low-confidence isolated R fragment; likely noise.
Very low-confidence isolated T fragment; likely noise.
Overlapping low-confidence T/A readings at same small location; no reliable visible engineering text.

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标裁剪区域是端面机械结构视图，显示法兰外形、中心孔、安装孔分布、引出线和角度标注，包含可见尺寸代号'C2'、'ΦC1'、'C7'及'45°'，用于表达零部件安装和几何尺寸关系。

text_annotations.correction_note: Corrected diameter symbol from ∅ to Φ.
Corrected overlapping OCR readings '5' and 'G' to the visible angular callout 45°.

terminology_notes: Symbolic callouts such as C1, C2, and C7 refer to dimensional table parameters; numeric values are not visible in the target crop.

engineering_summary.mounting_interface: Visible mounting-related callouts include C2, ΦC1, and two 45° angular spacing annotations.
engineering_summary.shaft_and_key_interface: No shaft or keyway numeric dimensions are visible in this crop.
engineering_summary.overall_envelope_and_clearance: C7 indicates a bottom envelope or mounting width parameter, but its numeric value is not specified in the crop.

unresolved_items.reason: Very low confidence small OCR fragments near the bottom-right area appear to be line or arrow noise, not reliable engineering text.

quality_control.origin_src_semantics: 5x crop before structure border trim; backend original data image
quality_control.target_src_semantics: structure-only crop after border trim; backend processed data image

items: 抽查 5x 裁切图清晰度和结构图去边效果
抽查 AI 命名、分类、标签合并、完整翻译和简单翻译质量
抽查 v2 JSON 是否满足后台拆解对比和人工复核需要
